results.rendered_html:
aparādh 4 5 P.
1 To offend, wrong, sin against, commit an offence against; (with gen. or loc. of person or thing); yauvanamatrāparādhyati  Mk. 9  is to blame; yasminūkasminnapi pūjarhe' parāddhā śakuṃtalā  Ś. 4 ; aparāddhosmi tatrabhavataḥ kaṇvasya  Ś. 7 ; mahatāṃ yo'parādhyeta dūrasthosmīti nāśvaset  Pt. 1. 307 ;  V. 2 ; kiṃ punarasurāvalepena bhavatīnāmaparāddhaṃ  V. 1 ; sometimes with dat. also; na dūye sātvatīsūnuryanmahyamaparādhyati  Śi. 2. 11. 
2 To annoy, disturb.
3 To prohibit.
